title: Issue with behavioural SRAM model bigger than 64-bit

features.name: for_loop_delayed_assignment_to_unpacked_array
features.description: Code should include a for loop that performs a delayed assignment (<=) to elements of an unpacked array

features.name: parameterized_loop_bound_exceeds_64_array_access
features.description: Code should include a for loop with a parameter-defined upper bound greater than 64 that accesses unpacked array elements via delayed assignment
